demo_context.narrative: NovaPay is a 3-year-old fintech, post-Series B. They operate in 9 jurisdictions, hold derivatives for treasury hedging, originate consumer credit at scale, and don't have the budget for a 20-person compliance team. RegRadar IS their compliance team.
pain_points: Subscribed to 4 regulatory newsletters, none surface impact on their book
Last quarter, missed a CFPB BNPL guidance update by 11 days -- nearly led to enforcement action
Quarterly compliance reviews take 2 weeks of senior engineering time
Cannot answer 'are we compliant?' on demand without firing off 6 emails
